description: Repairable limits extracted from P&W S1000D visual examination procedure

repairable_limits.title: A2 LE Nicks/Dents Repairable Depth Limit
repairable_limits.notes: Defects exceeding serviceable limits (RS-007) but within 0.080 in depth may be repaired by blending. Defects exceeding 0.080 in depth require part replacement.

repairable_limits.title: A2 LE Scratches — Not Repairable
repairable_limits.notes: Scratches exceeding serviceable limits are not repairable. Corrective action is replacement of the 5th stage rotor.

repairable_limits.title: A1/B1 Inner Half Out-of-Plane Deformation
repairable_limits.inspection_area: Inner half LE and TE (AREA A1, AREA B1)
repairable_limits.notes: Out-of-plane deformation on inner half LE/TE is NOT serviceable as-is but may be repaired if resulting geometry falls within established area limits for A1/B1.

disposition_flow: 1. Evaluate defect against serviceable limits (ibr_rules.json rule_sets)
2. If within serviceable limits → SERVICEABLE (no action required)
3. If exceeding serviceable limits → check repairable limits
4. If within repairable limits → REPAIRABLE (execute corrective action: Blend)
5. If exceeding repairable limits OR not repairable → REPLACE (execute replacement procedure)
